title: Review admin clipart IA proposal
summary: Review the current Trophy admin information architecture and domain naming ar...

request.prompt: Review the current Trophy admin information architecture and domain naming around customization and brand assets. The human proposes: move clipart management so it becomes a child area under Customization in admin, similar to Products > Collections/Categories; inside Clipart, admins create clipart categories and upload icons into those categories. Please inspect current code structure and OpenSpec/domain language, then answer briefly with: 1) the strongest arguments for or against this IA/domain move, 2) the top 3 confirmation questions Codex should ask the human before implementation, and 3) your recommended naming for the admin navigation and core domain terms. Keep the answer concise and concrete.
request.title: Review admin clipart IA proposal
